entries.desc: A no-IDE setup using only plan.md files and voice.

entries.desc: Replace chaotic terminal tabs with three layers: tmux for named windows, git worktrees for isolation, and Agent Teams for coordinated parallel agents.

entries.title: Wave-Based Parallel Execution
entries.desc: How /wave-execute fights context rot by splitting plans into dependency waves and dispatching each task to a fresh 200K-context agent.

entries.desc: Claude writes memory files locally during sessions.

entries.title: Prompt Engineering: CLAUDE.md Improvements
entries.desc: What an Anthropic prompt engineering course revealed about our global CLAUDE.md — three gaps, six edits, and the principle that one example beats three paragraphs of rules.

entries.title: Sub-agents & Agent Teams
entries.desc: Two ways to put more than one Claude on a problem.

entries.title: Rules in config, never in code
entries.desc: All business rules — keywords, queue mappings, timing offsets — are stored in an external config file or database table, never hardcoded in the engine.

entries.title: Railway + Vercel over single-platform hosting
entries.desc: Backend (Node.js + PostgreSQL) on Railway, frontend (React dashboard) on Vercel.

entries.title: Git submodule for shared toolkit, not private npm
entries.desc: The shared allconvos.ai toolkit is consumed via git submodule rather than a private npm registry.

entries.title: Vite + React SPA over Next.js
entries.desc: Marketing site and future customer dashboards built as a Vite + React SPA with React Router, not Next.js.

entries.title: GHL native voice agents as current delivery platform
entries.desc: All customer voice agents are delivered via Go High Level's native voice agent functionality.

entries.title: @prerenderer/rollup-plugin for SEO over SSR
entries.desc: Build-time pre-rendering via @prerenderer/rollup-plugin rather than server-side rendering.

entries.title: useSEO custom hook over react-helmet-async
entries.desc: A zero-dependency custom useSEO hook for managing page meta tags instead of react-helmet-async.

entries.title: Organisation + SoftwareApplication JSON-LD, not LocalBusiness
entries.desc: Structured data uses Organisation + SoftwareApplication + FAQPage schema, not LocalBusiness.

entries.title: Pricing tiers: $399/$599/$799 with $2,000 setup and tiered annual discounts
entries.desc: Three flat-rate tiers: Starter ($399/mo), Business ($599/mo), Professional ($799/mo).

entries.title: Two-stage reactivation model for AU compliance
entries.desc: Database reactivation campaigns use a two-stage permission-pass model to comply with AU Spam Act 2003 and Privacy Act 1988.

entries.title: AllConvos demo separation strategy
entries.desc: Voice AI demos must migrate off the AllConvos platform to parnellsystems.com before full product separation.

entries.title: No brand name commitment — use Parnell Systems
entries.desc: Do not hardcode any product brand name (previously "ZingCall" was considered).

entries.title: Stripe Payment Links over embedded checkout
entries.desc: Pricing page CTAs link to Stripe Payment Links rather than embedding Stripe Checkout or building a custom payment flow.

entries.title: 90-day pro-rata money-back guarantee, excludes setup fee
entries.desc: New customers get a 90-day pro-rata money-back guarantee on their subscription.

entries.title: Execute GTM plan week-by-week as independent work items
entries.desc: The 8-week GTM plan is executed one week at a time, each as an independent /ce:work scope.

entries.title: Triage-first for adoption of any recommendation set
entries.desc: On 2026-04-21 Claude was asked to adopt seven `/insights` report recommendations for the global Claude setup.

entries.title: Ship /ship and /resume as skills, not commands
entries.desc: The `/insights` report on 2026-04-21 recommended a verified-ship workflow and an explicit session-resumption procedure.

entries.title: Apply prompt engineering best practices to global CLAUDE.md
